Parses amount and hookData directly from the packed BurnMessageV2 body.","params":{"messageBody":"Packed BurnMessageV2 bytes \u2014 see layout in file header.","sender":"Sender address on source chain packed as bytes32                       (i.e. CrosschainEscrow address, left-padded).","sourceDomain":"Source chain CCTP domain (Arc Testnet = 26)."}}},"title":"TimeLockHook","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"claim(bytes32)":{"notice":"Claim time-locked USDC after the unlock timestamp."},"computeReleaseId(uint32,bytes32,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Pre-compute the releaseId for a pending transfer (matches handleReceiveMessage).         Frontend can call this off-chain to know the releaseId before bridging completes."},"getRelease(bytes32)":{"notice":"Get the full state of a pending release."},"handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,bytes)":{"notice":"Called by TokenMessengerV2 after minting USDC to this contract."}},"notice":"CCTP v2 hook contract deployed on destination chains (e.g. Ethereum Sepolia). \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502  FLOW                                                                       \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  1. Sender on Arc Testnet calls:                                            \u2502 \u2502       CrosschainEscrow.initiateConditionalTransfer(                         \u2502 \u2502         recipient  = address(TimeLockHook),   \u2190 this contract on dest      \u2502 \u2502         hookData   = abi.encode(finalRecipient, unlockTimestamp),           \u2502 \u2502         ...                                                                 \u2502 \u2502       )                                                                     \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  2. Circle attests the burn. Anyone calls:                                  \u2502 \u2502       MessageTransmitter.receiveMessage(messageBytes, attestation)          \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 TokenMessengerV2 mints USDC to address(TimeLockHook)                 \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 TokenMessengerV2 calls TimeLockHook.handleReceiveMessage(...)         \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  3. TimeLockHook stores a PendingRelease from decoded hookData.             \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  4. After unlockTimestamp, finalRecipient calls:                            \u2502 \u2502       TimeLockHook.claim(releaseId)                                         \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 USDC transferred to finalRecipient                                   \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 hookData encoding:   abi.encode(address finalRecipient, uint256 unlockTimestamp) releaseId (deterministic, pre-computable by frontend):   keccak256(abi.encode(sourceDomain, messageSender_bytes32, finalRecipient, amount, unlockTimestamp)) BurnMessageV2 packed layout (all offsets in bytes):   [0:4]    version         uint32   [4:36]   burnToken       bytes32   [36:68]  mintRecipient   bytes32   [68:100] amount          uint256   [100:132] messageSender  bytes32   [132:164] maxFee         uint256   [164:168] hookDataLen    uint32   [168:]   hookData        bytes Deployment addresses:   Ethereum Sepolia MessageTransmitterV2: 0xE737e5cEBEEBa77EFE34D4aa090756590b1CE275 (*)   Ethereum Sepolia USDC:                0x1c7D4B196Cb0C7B01d743Fbc6116a902379C7238   (*) verify at https://developers.circle.com/stablecoins/docs/evm-smart-contracts NOTE: Circle's CCTP v2 hook interface calls handleReceiveMessage on mintRecipient       after minting. If the function selector does not match the deployed       TokenMessengerV2, check Circle's latest IMessageHandlerV2 interface.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/TimeLockHook.sol":"TimeLockHook"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9ac7895c65853fb5b98f95d1f967e313f4a2a823a9a70409d73b48f23f1c7aa8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a24ccfc240c86caacbfe65266375f036381985555d8176b98cad4a9f98d23b5e","dweb:/ipfs/Qmf2WnEs4CVK9pmgQ4SAhtkZtg6qKhViY7G5gteJfJeeyy"]},"src/TimeLockHook.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8013490735dc906dabb0dccddf6a2d62f9e9a34d9cb402fda628843db7e1fe8c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://56af3dbfd5a80dfc7b03fa25529622c2bc9ea3d4eb3ebc0deddc66c44b9af514","dweb:/ipfs/QmU66BQEZ1voL6NidH8SAWVAJwTXmkMrHZHC5ZvJ62rA9j"]}},"version":1}

params.releaseId: The release ID emitted in the ReleaseScheduled event, or                   pre-computed by the frontend using computeReleaseId().

params.finalRecipient: Address that will receive USDC after unlock.
params.messageSender: CrosschainEscrow address on source chain, left-padded to bytes32.
params.unlockTimestamp: Unix timestamp after which claim() is allowed.

handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,byte.details: msg.sender MUST be the Circle MessageTransmitterV2 on this chain.      Parses amount and hookData directly from the packed BurnMessageV2 body.

params.messageBody: Packed BurnMessageV2 bytes — see layout in file header.
params.sender: Sender address on source chain packed as bytes32                       (i.e. CrosschainEscrow address, left-padded).

claim(bytes32).notice: Claim time-locked USDC after the unlock timestamp.

computeReleaseId(uint32,bytes32,address,.notice: Pre-compute the releaseId for a pending transfer (matches handleReceiveMessage).         Frontend can call this off-chain to know the releaseId before bridging completes.

getRelease(bytes32).notice: Get the full state of a pending release.

handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,byte.notice: Called by TokenMessengerV2 after minting USDC to this contract.
